transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-13]
[00:00] You: Marketing campaign planning for the Q3 product launch. Launch is August 18th.
[00:40] Speaker 1: I'll have the launch blog post first draft ready by July 25th. I'll need SEO review from Speaker 2 before we finalize.
[01:20] Speaker 2: I'll do the SEO review and keyword optimization on the blog post by July 28th. I'll also update the website landing page copy — I can have the first draft by July 20th.
[02:00] Speaker 3: Social media plan: I'll put together a 30-day content calendar for LinkedIn and Twitter by July 18th. I'll need the key messaging doc from Speaker 1 first.
[02:40] Speaker 1: I'll send Speaker 3 the key messaging document by July 15th.
[03:00] You: What about email campaign?
[03:15] Speaker 4: I'll build the email sequence in HubSpot — 5 emails over 3 weeks. First email goes out the day of launch, August 18th. I'll have all five emails drafted by August 8th.
[03:55] Speaker 2: We should also do a press release. I'll coordinate with the PR agency and have the embargo version ready by August 10th.
[04:30] You: Good. Paid ads — Speaker 3?
[04:45] Speaker 3: I'll set up the Google and LinkedIn ad campaigns by August 11th. Budget is $15k for the first month.
[05:10] Speaker 1: I also need to get customer testimonials for the launch materials. I'll reach out to our three reference customers by July 16th to ask for quotes.
[05:45] You: Great. Speaker 4, can you also set up UTM tracking for all the launch links?
[06:00] Speaker 4: I'll set up UTM tracking and document all campaign links in the launch tracker by August 14th.
[06:20] You: The go/no-go call is August 15th. Everything should be ready by then.
